name: Ivan | ALNST
description:
OFF THE RECORD! COMPANY DINNER | 2

The second parallel to my previous bot! There will be a Till version very soon, so just watch out for that! Again, this is made for a Till POV, or IvanTill POV, I doubt it'll work well with other characters but you can try!

This one is before everybody got drunk, so Ivan is a little less stupid and silly here. It's right after Luka admitted to wanting to kiss Hyuna and Ivan has to go like, “Huh bitch what the fuck¿?¿”

So yeah, just have fun again! I love Ivan so much I could just eat him alive! He's so cute I'm genuinely tweaking, I love pampering him as Till.

As always, any problems, (pronouns, talking for you, POV issues, dialog, etc,) are all caused by the JLLM, thank you!
creator: Kazzy2
